title: Fix MiniMax endpoint
goal: Fix public issue #131 by correcting the MiniMax OpenAI-compatible endpoint from minimaxi.com to minimax.io with test coverage.
completionConditions: Encontrar definição MiniMax usada por login/provider setup
Executar validação direcionada, cargo check e selfdev build
notes: Issue #131 reports jcode login --provider minimax shows https://api.minimaxi.com/v1 but MiniMax docs use https://api.minimax.io/v1.
